description: Allowlist for @reigh/editor-sdk public re-exports that originate from internal paths outside src/sdk/. Every entry must include a justification explaining why the re-export belongs on the public boundary.

allowlist.justification: M5 renderability contracts: these are stable runtime constants used by extension authors to classify render blockers, determinism statuses, and planner-owned render routes. The matcher message helper is a pure function that produces a diagnostic string from a shaderId and scope — it has no side effects and no internal coupling.

M5 renderability type contracts: these types define the public vocabulary for render blockers, material refs, artifact boundaries, capability findings, and shader scopes. Extension authors reference these when implementing export-level contracts, and the SDK must expose them to avoid duplicate type taxonomies.
